case_title: SAM PAK SUM TANG VS. SANTOS SENOVIA FUENTES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, SAM PAK SUM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FUENTES, SANTOS SENOVIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
